text: Author: jkois Date: Tue Aug 28 08:03:26 2012 New Revision: 39463 URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/doc/39463 Log: PR: www/170798 Update of contact information. Requested by: Anderson Guzman Modified: head/share/sgml/commercial.consult.xml Modified: head/share/sgml/commercial.consult.xml ============================================================================== --- head/share/sgml/commercial.consult.xml Mon Aug 27 21:25:45 2012 (r39462) +++ head/share/sgml/commercial.consult.xml Tue Aug 28 08:03:26 2012 (r39463) @@ -969,7 +969,7 @@ Pendulo Software - http://www.pendulosoftware.com.ve + http://www.pendulosoftware.com Based in Caracas, Venezuela, Pendulo Software provides and specializes in support and consulting for FreeBSD and Linux @@ -981,12 +981,12 @@ routine of server management, security audits and updates, to high performance computing and mitigating attacks. For more information about our services, please visit our multilanguage website, send an + href="http://www.pendulosoftware.com">website, send an email to atencioncliente@pendulosoftware.com.ve + href="mailto:atencioncliente@pendulosoftware.com">atencioncliente@pendulosoftware.com or infocorp@pendulosoftware.com.ve - or call us under +58 (212) 637-1074, +1 (407) 536-9895, or + href="mailto:infocorp@pendulosoftware.com">infocorp@pendulosoftware.com + or call us under +58 (212) 625-0708, +1 (407) 536-9895 or +1 (253) 642-6484. _______________________________________________ svn-doc-all@freebsd.org mailing list http://lists.freebsd.org/mailman/listinfo/svn-doc-all To unsubscribe, send any mail to "svn-doc-all-unsubscribe@freebsd.org"
